description_long: This is a glossy black grand piano with a classic curved body and a full-length keyboard. The piano features a highly polished surface, reflecting light and giving it a sleek, elegant appearance. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, and three metallic pedals are visible beneath the keyboard. The piano stands on three sturdy legs, each with a wooden base, providing stability and support. The lid is fully closed, covering the strings and internal mechanisms. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached to the instrument.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a full keyboard, three pedals, and a closed lid, featuring a sleek and elegant design.
description_view_0: The piano is seen from an angled top view, highlighting the full keyboard and the curved body.
description_view_1: The rear of the piano is visible, showing the smooth, uninterrupted black surface of the closed lid.
description_view_2: A side view displays the length of the piano, the closed lid, and the keyboard edge.
description_view_3: The front view reveals the entire keyboard, three pedals, and both front legs with wooden bases.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard full-length keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a traditional arrangement.
